name: Ichimoku KAMA Dual-Adaptive Trend
edge_hypothesis: Two adaptive systems combined for all-regime edge. Ichimoku's Tenkan-sen (ITS_9) vs Kijun-sen (IKS_26) captures the relationship between short-term and medium-term equilibrium — when Tenkan > Kijun, short-term momentum exceeds the medium-term average, confirming bullish pressure. KAMA (Kaufman Adaptive Moving Average) adapts its smoothing speed to market conditions: fast in trends, slow in ranges — proven adaptive architecture (KAMA Stoch v1 PF=1.857, ranging PF=4.87). The combination: Ichimoku momentum direction + KAMA adaptive trend confirmation = two independent adaptive systems that both agree on direction. Neither uses fixed parameters in the traditional sense — both self-adjust. Ichimoku has never been tested as a primary signal in this system. KAMA is a validated all-regime performer. This tests whether Ichimoku momentum + KAMA adaptation creates a new all-regime architecture. Both conditions are zone-based (continuous) for reliable signal frequency.

variants.name: ichi_kama_v1_8to1
variants.description: Core thesis: Tenkan > Kijun (Ichimoku momentum) + close > KAMA (adaptive trend). Dual-adaptive confirmation. 8:1 R:R. Zone-based conditions ensure reliable trade frequency.

components.notes: Ichimoku Tenkan-sen (9-period equilibrium). Short-term momentum direction.
Ichimoku Kijun-sen (26-period equilibrium). Medium-term reference. Tenkan > Kijun = bullish momentum.
Kaufman Adaptive MA — proven adaptive architecture. Fast in trends, slow in ranges. Validates direction with speed-adaptive smoothing.
ATR-based position sizing and R:R framework.

variants.name: ichi_kama_v2_6to1
variants.description: Tighter 6:1 R:R (9x ATR TP). Tests whether dual-adaptive entries produce more frequent, shorter-duration wins. If both adaptive systems confirm direction accurately, faster TP capture may improve win rate and compound more effectively.

components.notes: ATR-based R:R — tighter 6:1 for faster captures.

variants.name: ichi_kama_v3_wide_10to1
variants.description: Extended 10:1 R:R with wider 2.0 ATR stop. Gives trades more room to breathe while targeting larger moves. If dual-adaptive entry produces high-conviction signals, wider stops reduce noise exits and larger TP captures full trend extensions.

components.notes: Wider 2.0 ATR stop + 20x TP for full trend capture.

indicator_roles.baseline: ITS_9 / IKS_26 — Ichimoku Tenkan-sen vs Kijun-sen. Short-term vs medium-term equilibrium momentum.
indicator_roles.confirmation: KAMA_10_2_30 — Kaufman Adaptive MA. Speed-adaptive trend confirmation.
indicator_roles.volume_volatility: ATR_14 — position sizing and R:R framework.
